original_image_tags: Typewritten document on aged paper. A red "SECRET" stamp is centered at the top and bottom margins. The word "COPY" is typed in the upper left corner.

elements.description: A typed government document page containing text and stamps. Visible elements include typed header 'COPY', a crossed-out 'SECRET' stamp at the top and bottom, a 'SECRET' stamp at the top, hole punch marks, and typed text with a signature block at the bottom.

judge.reason: Description A reports two 'SECRET' stamps, while Description B reports one crossed-out 'SECRET' stamp and a second separate 'SECRET' stamp, creating a direct contradiction on the specific visual content of the stamps.
